posts.author: kmcmunn (Kelly McMunn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I need the option to have a formula that subtracts work days from a date. I have a date column that automatically populates via an integration between a survey website and Monday.com. I need a formula to subtract work days from that date to create an internal due date. Using the automation for when date changes, move this date by X of days does not work because the item comes in from an integration.
